context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 89
WINDOW: 1293.800s to 1329.533s (smile at 1313.800s to 1314.533s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1284.090-1317.750] interviewee: He has a pharmacy there. And you can work there. I can help him. I went to Auschwitz. And he embraced me and was so happy I came. I said, what do you want me to do? I want you to go home every day in the evening, take care of medications, bring medications from Katowice to Auschwitz. You mean the City of Auschwitz.
[1317.750-1370.660] interviewee: To the City of Auschwitz, yeah. But I said, it's a border. I cannot cross the border between Silesia and the Galicia at Auschwitz was a border.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
medications from Katowice to Auschwitz.
